title: Change dropdown options based on filter applied in another column
excerpt: I am building a board where the selection from a dropdown menu in one column will determine the items shown on the dropdown menu in another column.  An example of this is  selecting a specific state from the dropdown in …

posts.author: Liesl (Liesl Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: I am building a board where the selection from a dropdown menu in one column will determine the items shown on the dropdown menu in another column. An example of this is selecting a specific state from the dropdown in one column and then only having the towns in that state available for selection in the next column. How do I do this?
